sections.paragraph:
Original: כּרה

Transliteration: kârâh

Phonetic: kaw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to dig, excavate, dig through
    1. (Qal) to dig
    2. (Niphal) to be dug
  2. (Qal) to give a banquet or feast
  3. (Qal) to get by trade, trade, buy

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1033,1034,1035

Part(s) of speech: Verb
